results.original_title: I Need You to Leave: A Look at the End of the 2023-2024 School Year
results.overview: A "documentary" made by two Millennium High School (MHS) Students during the last three weeks of school.
results.title: I Need You to Leave: A Look at the End of the 2023-2024 School Year

results.name: Train to the End of the World
results.original_name: 終末トレインどこへいく？
results.overview: In a seemingly ordinary rural town, something strange is happening to the residents. But Shizuru Chikura is more concerned for her missing friend. Determined to find her, Shizuru and three other girls board an abandoned train and travel to the outside world, unsure if they'll make it back alive. As they venture toward the unknown, the question looms: What awaits them at the final stop?
